findings.location: 内部構造・改修時の留意点 section
findings.description: The entire '内部構造・改修時の留意点' section is absent from the knowledge file. This section contains: (1) the key fact that author.tag is an empty file existing only to pass JSP compilation; (2) that the spec sheet view is composed of SpecSheetTemplate.xlsx and SpecSheetInterpreter.js; (3) the full component file path table listing author.tag, spec.js, SpecSheetView.js, SpecSheetInterpreter.js, SpecSheetTemplate.xlsx, and SpecSheetTemplate.files with their roles. An AI answering modification or troubleshooting questions about this widget needs this information.
findings.source_evidence: サーバ表示で動作するタグファイル(author.tag) は、JSPコンパイルを通すためだけの空ファイルである。設計書ビューはテンプレートファイルである SpecSheetTemplate.xlsx と、各項目の表示内容を制御する SpecSheetInterpreter.js によって構成される。[+ 部品一覧 table]

findings.description: Source has 3 h2 sections (コードサンプル, 仕様, 内部構造・改修時の留意点) but the knowledge file contains only 1 section (s1). The '内部構造・改修時の留意点' h2 section has no corresponding section in the knowledge file at all.
findings.source_evidence: Source h2 headings: 'コードサンプル' (==), '仕様' (==), '内部構造・改修時の留意点' (==). Knowledge file sections: {"s1": ...} only.

findings.description: PascalCase class/file names referenced in the source are absent from hints: SpecSheetTemplate, SpecSheetInterpreter, SpecSheetView. These are directly named components of the spec sheet view system and would be useful search terms for AI retrieval.
